name: ETH Zurich - Swiss Federal Institute of Technology
tuitionNote: Swiss: CHF 730/sem. Non-Swiss (from 2025): CHF 2,190/sem (tripled). ~EUR 1,350/yr for non-Swiss. (ethz.ch)
bachelorRequirements: Swiss Matura or equivalent + ETH entrance exam for non-Swiss + German B2 (BSc mostly in German)
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) in relevant field + IELTS 7.0 or TOEFL 100 (English-taught MSc)

name: EPFL - Swiss Federal Institute of Technology Lausanne
tuitionNote: Swiss: CHF 730/sem. Non-Swiss (from 2025): CHF 2,190/sem (tripled). ~EUR 1,350/yr for non-Swiss. (epfl.ch)
bachelorRequirements: Swiss Matura or equivalent + EPFL entrance exam for non-Swiss + French B2 (BSc in French)
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) in Engineering/Science + GPA ≥5.0/6 + English B2-C1 (MSc mostly in English)

name: University of Zurich (UZH)
tuitionNote: CHF 720/sem for Swiss, CHF 1,440/sem for non-Swiss (~EUR 1,500/yr). (uzh.ch)
bachelorRequirements: Swiss Matura or equivalent + German C1 (BSc mostly in German)
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + relevant field + German C1 or English C1 (programme-dependent)

name: University of Geneva (UNIGE)
tuitionNote: CHF 500/sem for all students (~EUR 950/yr). Same fees for Swiss & international. (unige.ch)
bachelorRequirements: Swiss Matura or equivalent + French B2-C1 (BSc in French)
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + relevant field + French B2-C1 or English B2 (programme-dependent)

name: University of Basel (UNIBAS)
tuitionNote: CHF 850/sem for all students (~EUR 1,600/yr). Same fees for Swiss & international. (unibas.ch)
bachelorRequirements: Swiss Matura or equivalent + German C1 (BSc mostly in German)
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + relevant field + German C1 or English B2-C1

name: University of Bern (UNIBE)
tuitionNote: CHF 805/sem for Swiss, CHF 1,305/sem for non-Swiss (~EUR 1,500/yr non-Swiss). (unibe.ch)
bachelorRequirements: Swiss Matura or equivalent + German C1 (BSc mostly in German)
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + relevant field + German C1 or English B2

name: University of Lausanne (UNIL)
tuitionNote: CHF 580/sem for all students (~EUR 1,100/yr). Same fees for Swiss & international. (unil.ch)
bachelorRequirements: Swiss Matura or equivalent + French B2-C1 (BSc in French)
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + relevant field + French B2 or English B2 (programme-dependent)

name: University of St. Gallen (HSG)
tuitionNote: Swiss: CHF 1,310/sem. Non-Swiss: CHF 3,326/sem (~EUR 6,200/yr). Top business school. (unisg.ch)
bachelorRequirements: Swiss Matura or equivalent + HSG entrance exam (for non-Swiss) + German B2 or English C1
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + GMAT/GRE + IELTS 7.0 or TOEFL 100 + HSG admission test

name: University of Fribourg (UNIFR)
tuitionNote: CHF 735/sem for all students (~EUR 1,400/yr). Bilingual (French/German) university. (unifr.ch)
bachelorRequirements: Swiss Matura or equivalent + French B2 or German B2 (bilingual programmes available)
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + relevant field + French B2 or German B2 or English B2

name: University of Neuchâtel (UNINE)
tuitionNote: Swiss: CHF 720/yr. Non-Swiss: CHF 1,740/yr (~EUR 1,600/yr). (unine.ch)
bachelorRequirements: Swiss Matura or equivalent + French B2 (BSc in French)
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + relevant field + French B2 or English B2

name: University of Lucerne (UNILU)
tuitionNote: CHF 810/sem for all students (~EUR 1,600/yr). Smallest cantonal university. (unilu.ch)
bachelorRequirements: Swiss Matura or equivalent + German C1 (BSc in German)
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + relevant field + German C1 or English B2

name: Università della Svizzera italiana (USI)
tuitionNote: CHF 4,000/sem for all students (~EUR 7,500/yr). Italian-speaking university. (usi.ch)
bachelorRequirements: Swiss Matura or equivalent + Italian B2 (some BSc in English/Italian)
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + relevant field + English B2-C1 (many MSc in English)

name: Zurich University of Applied Sciences (ZHAW)
tuitionNote: CHF 720/sem for all students (~EUR 1,400/yr). Largest UAS in Switzerland. (zhaw.ch)
bachelorRequirements: Swiss Vocational Matura (Berufsmaturität) or equivalent + German B2-C1
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + relevant work experience + German B2 or English B2

name: Bern University of Applied Sciences (BFH)
tuitionNote: CHF 750/sem for Swiss, CHF 950/sem for non-Swiss (~EUR 1,500/yr non-Swiss). (bfh.ch)
bachelorRequirements: Swiss Vocational Matura or equivalent + German B2
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + relevant work experience + German B2 or English B2

name: University of Applied Sciences and Arts Northwestern Switzerland (FHNW)
tuitionNote: CHF 700/sem for all students (~EUR 1,400/yr). 9 schools across 4 cantons. (fhnw.ch)
bachelorRequirements: Swiss Vocational Matura or equivalent + German B2
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + relevant work experience + German B2 or English B2

name: Lucerne University of Applied Sciences and Arts (HSLU)
tuitionNote: CHF 750/sem for all students (~EUR 1,400/yr). Strong in design, music, engineering. (hslu.ch)
bachelorRequirements: Swiss Vocational Matura or equivalent + German B2
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + relevant work experience + German B2 or English B2

name: University of Applied Sciences of Eastern Switzerland (OST)
tuitionNote: CHF 720/sem for all students (~EUR 1,400/yr). Campuses in St. Gallen, Rapperswil, Buchs. (ost.ch)
bachelorRequirements: Swiss Vocational Matura or equivalent + German B2
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + relevant work experience + German B2 or English B2

name: University of Applied Sciences and Arts Western Switzerland (HES-SO)
localName: Haute école spécialisée de Suisse occidentale
tuitionNote: CHF 500/sem for all students (~EUR 1,000/yr). Largest UAS in Switzerland, 21,000+ students across 6 cantons. (hes-so.ch)
bachelorRequirements: Swiss Vocational Matura or equivalent + French B2
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + relevant work experience + French B2

name: University of Applied Sciences and Arts of Southern Switzerland (SUPSI)
localName: Scuola universitaria professionale della Svizzera italiana
tuitionNote: CHF 800/sem for all students (~EUR 1,500/yr). Italian-speaking UAS. (supsi.ch)
bachelorRequirements: Swiss Vocational Matura or equivalent + Italian B2
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + relevant work experience + Italian B2 or English B2

name: Zurich University of the Arts (ZHdK)
tuitionNote: CHF 720/sem for all students (~EUR 1,400/yr). Part of ZHAW/ZFH group. Top arts school. (zhdk.ch)
bachelorRequirements: Swiss Matura or equivalent + portfolio/audition + German B2
masterRequirements: Bachelor's in Arts + portfolio + German B2 or English B2

name: Zurich University of Teacher Education (PHZH)
tuitionNote: CHF 720/sem for all students (~EUR 1,400/yr). Largest teacher education university in Switzerland. (phzh.ch)
bachelorRequirements: Swiss Matura + German C1 + aptitude assessment
masterRequirements: Bachelor's in Education + German C1 + teaching experience

name: Kalaidos University of Applied Sciences
tuitionNote: Private UAS. BSc ~CHF 6,000-8,000/sem, MSc ~CHF 7,000-10,000/sem (~EUR 12K-15K/yr). (kalaidos-fh.ch)
bachelorRequirements: Swiss Matura or equivalent + German B2 or English B2 + entrance exam
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + work experience + German B2 or English B2

name: EHL Hospitality Business School
tuitionNote: Private. BSc ~CHF 40,000/yr, MSc ~CHF 44,000/yr. World's #1 hospitality school. (ehl.edu)
bachelorRequirements: High school diploma + IELTS 7.0 or TOEFL 100 + EHL entrance exam + interview
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree + GMAT/GRE + IELTS 7.0 + 1yr work experience + interview

name: Glion Institute of Higher Education
tuitionNote: Private. BSc ~CHF 37,000/yr, MSc ~CHF 34,000/yr. Top hospitality school globally. (glion.edu)
bachelorRequirements: High school diploma + IELTS 5.5+ + interview
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree + IELTS 6.0+ + interview + relevant experience

name: Les Roches Global Hospitality Education
tuitionNote: Private. BSc ~CHF 37,000/yr, MSc ~CHF 32,000/yr. Top 3 hospitality school globally. (lesroches.edu)
bachelorRequirements: High school diploma + IELTS 5.5+ + interview
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree + IELTS 6.0+ + professional experience

name: Franklin University Switzerland
tuitionNote: Private American-Swiss university. BSc ~CHF 22,000/sem, MSc ~CHF 13,500/sem. (fus.edu)
bachelorRequirements: High school diploma + SAT/ACT optional + IELTS 6.5 or TOEFL 80
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree + IELTS 6.5 or TOEFL 80 + 2 recommendation letters

name: IMD Business School
tuitionNote: Private. MBA ~CHF 100,000 (1yr). Executive education focus. No undergraduate programmes. (imd.org)
bachelorRequirements: N/A — MBA/executive education only
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree + 5yr+ work experience + GMAT 680+ + IELTS 7.0 + interview

name: University of Applied Sciences of the Grisons (FHGR)
tuitionNote: CHF 800/sem for all students (~EUR 1,500/yr). Specialises in tourism, IT, multimedia. (fhgr.ch)
bachelorRequirements: Swiss Vocational Matura or equivalent + German B2
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + relevant work experience + German B2 or English B2

name: Haute école pédagogique du canton de Vaud (HEP Vaud)
localName: Haute école pédagogique du canton de Vaud
tuitionNote: CHF 500/sem for all students (~EUR 1,000/yr). Teacher education in French-speaking Switzerland. (hepl.ch)
bachelorRequirements: Swiss Matura + French C1 + aptitude assessment
masterRequirements: Bachelor's in Education + French C1 + teaching aptitude

name: Pädagogische Hochschule Bern (PHBern)
tuitionNote: CHF 750/sem for all students (~EUR 1,500/yr). Teacher education in German. (phbern.ch)
bachelorRequirements: Swiss Matura + German C1 + aptitude assessment
masterRequirements: Bachelor's in Education + German C1

name: Geneva School of Economics and Management (GSEM, part of UNIGE)
localName: Geneva School of Economics and Management
tuitionNote: Part of University of Geneva. CHF 500/sem for all students (~EUR 950/yr). (unige.ch/gsem)
bachelorRequirements: Swiss Matura or equivalent + French B2
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) in Economics/Management + French B2 or English B2

name: Graduate Institute of International and Development Studies (IHEID)
localName: Institut de hautes études internationales et du développement
tuitionNote: Graduate-only. CHF 5,800/yr for all students (~EUR 5,500/yr). Leading in international affairs. (graduateinstitute.ch)
bachelorRequirements: N/A — Graduate programmes only
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + strong academic record + IELTS 7.0 or TOEFL 100 + 2 references

name: Swiss Federal University for Vocational Education and Training (SFUVET)
tuitionNote: Federal institution. ~CHF 500/sem (~EUR 1,000/yr). Vocational education & training focus. (ehb.swiss)
bachelorRequirements: Swiss Vocational Matura + teaching experience in VET + German/French/Italian
masterRequirements: Bachelor's + VET teaching experience + relevant language proficiency

name: Haute école de gestion de Genève (HEG Geneva, part of HES-SO)
localName: Haute école de gestion de Genève
tuitionNote: Part of HES-SO. CHF 500/sem (~EUR 1,000/yr). Business/IT programmes in French. (hesge.ch/heg)
bachelorRequirements: Swiss Vocational Matura or equivalent + French B2
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + French B2 or English B2

name: Webster University Geneva
tuitionNote: Private American university. BSc ~CHF 23,000/yr, MSc ~CHF 21,000/yr. (webster.ch)
bachelorRequirements: High school diploma + IELTS 6.0 or TOEFL 80 (English-taught)
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree + IELTS 6.5 or TOEFL 80

name: EU Business School Geneva
tuitionNote: Private. ~CHF 23,000/yr. International business focus, English-taught. (euruni.edu)
bachelorRequirements: High school diploma + IELTS 6.0 + interview
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree + IELTS 6.0 + interview + CV

name: Robert Kennedy College
tuitionNote: Private. Online/blended format. BSc ~CHF 8,500/yr, MSc ~CHF 10,500/yr. (rkc.edu)
bachelorRequirements: High school diploma + IELTS 5.5 (online/blended programmes in English)
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree + IELTS 6.0 + work experience
